name: Kagi Search API
what_it_does: Kagi provides a premium, privacy-first search API with no ads and high-quality results. Unlike Google or Bing, Kagi is a paid search engine that prioritizes result quality and user privacy. The API lets agents search the web without the noise of ad-influenced results and without Google's data collection.
use_cases: Agents that need high-quality web search results without ad bias
Research agents where result quality matters more than cost per query
Privacy-sensitive agent applications where Google/Bing data collection is a concern
Universal Summarizer: AI-powered summaries of any URL for agent context
FastGPT endpoint: quick answers for agent sub-queries
not_for: High-volume search (cost per query is higher than Google/Bing APIs)
Applications needing real-time news (freshness varies by plan)
Teams optimizing for raw search volume over quality
best_when: You want high-quality search results without ad influence, and privacy matters. Particularly good for research agents that need reliable, unbiased results.
avoid_when: Cost per query is your primary concern, or you need the scale and freshness of Google's search index.

auth.notes: API key authentication via Authorization header. Simple, clean auth model. API access requires Kagi subscription.

pricing.paid_tiers: Search queries: ~$2.25 per 100 queries (Team plan). Summarizer: $0.030 per summary. FastGPT: $0.025 per call.
pricing.notes: Requires active Kagi subscription ($10-25/month) plus API credits. Not free. Higher quality has higher cost.

performance.rate_limits: 1 request/second on standard; higher available on enterprise

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP error codes with JSON bodies. Clear credit balance errors when quota is exceeded. Well-documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search queries are idempotent by nature (same query returns same results).
known_agent_gotchas: Requires paid Kagi subscription — not available without account payment
Rate limit of 1 req/sec is very restrictive for multi-agent parallelism
Freshness not guaranteed on Standard plan — some results may be hours old
No JavaScript rendering — cannot scrape dynamic sites
Credit balance required — agents must handle credit exhaustion gracefully
Summarizer requires URL access — paywalled/login-required content fails
agent_readiness.security_notes: Privacy-focused: no user tracking, no ad profiling. EU-based, GDPR compliant. Better privacy posture than Google/Bing.
